description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a low, light-colored perimeter wall and a well-maintained lawn with several shrubs and trees. The house features a prominent central chimney, a sloped hip roof in dark gray, and a mix of stone and light beige exterior walls. Large, rectangular windows with reddish-brown frames are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear facades, providing ample natural light. A glass-enclosed sunroom or conservatory extends from one side of the house, adjacent to a single-car garage with a flat roof. The property includes a paved driveway leading to the garage and a walkway to the main entrance, which is subtly integrated into the front facade.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, stone and beige walls, large windows, a glass sunroom, and a single-car garage, all set within a walled, landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central chimney, symmetrical windows, garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass sunroom/conservatory, garage, and the expanse of the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sunroom, large windows, and the spacious backyard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the side elevation with additional windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows and a glass sunroom
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is understated, flush with the facade, featuring a simple door and a paved walkway, without prominent steps or porch.
